hooks.command: FILEPATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && [ -n "$WORKTREE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILEPATH" in "$WORKTREE_PATH"/*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot modify files in main branch worktree ($WORKTREE_PATH)" >&2; exit 1;; esac; fi

CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|push|add|reset|rebase|merge|cherry-pick|revert)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Kanban CC cannot modify git state on main branch' >&2; exit 1; fi
